sources.title: Recently, My Sister Is Unusual Live Action Anime 2014
sources.description: Live action version of anime. Yuya has a new stepsister named Mitsuki and shortly after the family moves in together, she is haunted by a ghost. The ghost, Hiyori, often takes over Misuki's body and there is a chastity belt for some reason.  Gets surprisingly graphic though being of Japanese pedigree, the nasty bits are all blurred.  Japanese with optional English subtitles

metadata.Plot: Mitsuki and Yuya become stepsister and stepbrother because of their parents' marriage. Mitsuki can't get along with her new family and Yuya doesn't know how to approach his new stepsister. One day, Mitsuki becomes possessed by the spirit of Hiyori. Hiyori likes Yuya and believes Yuya can help her get to heaven. Hiyori places a leather chastity belt upon on Mitsuki and a plan takes place to help send Hiyori to heaven.
metadata.Writer: Mari Matsuzawa, Iggy Coen, Takehiko Minato
metadata.Actors: Tenka Hashimoto, Yukichi Kobayashi, Mayu Mitsui
